description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, you can attempt a single trip combat maneuver check at your full base attack bonus against a foe within reach. If you succeed, the target is knocked prone as normal and you can attempt an additional trip combat maneuver check (using your full base attack bonus ) against a foe that is adjacent to the first target and also within reach. You can attempt only one additional combat maneuver per round with this feat.
